title: Solana open interest drops 30% as altcoins slump: Is $68 SOL next?
summary: Solana open interest drops 30% as altcoins slump: Is $68 SOL next?
briefing: Bulls abandon ship as SOL futures open interest dropped 30% in May. With the price weakening near $80, Solana may be destined for new lows.

title: Fidelity Digital Assets highlights 'growing evidence' of shift from dollar-based systems
summary: Fidelity Digital Assets highlights 'growing evidence' of shift from dollar-based systems
briefing: The investment firm said nation-states and central banks are increasingly turning to assets like Bitcoin and gold as alternative settlement systems outside of US control.

title: Prediction markets legal battles heat up in Minnesota, Rhode Island
summary: Prediction markets legal battles heat up in Minnesota, Rhode Island
briefing: Kalshi sued Minnesota while the CFTC filed against Rhode Island as legal wrangling with state-level authorities seems likely headed to the US Supreme Court.

title: Bit Digital buys $20M worth of Ethereum, expands treasury to 158K ETH
summary: Bit Digital buys $20M worth of Ethereum, expands treasury to 158K ETH
briefing: The purchase pushed the Nasdaq-listed company ahead of Coinbase Global to become the fourth-largest public corporate holder of Ether, according to CoinGecko data.

title: SEC Commissioner Peirce defends crypto privacy tools against surveillance push
summary: SEC Commissioner Peirce defends crypto privacy tools against surveillance push
briefing: The leader of the regulator's Crypto Task Force said privacy-enhancing technologies can strengthen investor protection and urged regulators not to treat them with suspicion.

title: Bitcoin enters cooldown phase under $75K as ‘active distribution’ rises
summary: Bitcoin enters cooldown phase under $75K as ‘active distribution’ rises
briefing: Bitcoin’s slide toward $73,000 triggered active distribution signals, but lowered realized losses and weak spot volumes point to easing sell pressure.

title: Trump claims he can ‘future proof’ crypto regulation with CLARITY Act
summary: Trump claims he can ‘future proof’ crypto regulation with CLARITY Act
briefing: The future of a digital asset market structure bill in Congress is still uncertain amid concerns over ethics provisions, with the president, whose crypto ties are under scrutiny, weighing in on social media.

title: France's AMF regulator sets June 30 deadline for MiCA licensing
summary: France's AMF regulator sets June 30 deadline for MiCA licensing
briefing: The European Union's Markets in Crypto Assets regulations first took effect in 2024, but gave crypto service providers time to fully comply with the framework.

title: Anthropic Nears $1 Trillion Valuation, Topping OpenAI After Fresh $65 Billion Raise
summary: Anthropic Nears $1 Trillion Valuation, Topping OpenAI After Fresh $65 Billion Raise
briefing: Claude maker Anthropic said annualized revenue surpassed $47 billion as it expands cloud and compute partnerships.

title: AI Agents Are Learning to Predict What Users Want—Before They Ask for It
summary: AI Agents Are Learning to Predict What Users Want—Before They Ask for It
briefing: Researchers in China built a model that uses an AI’s downtime to prepare for users’ next question before they ask it.

title: Sui Network Goes Down for Hours, Just Months After the Last Downtime
summary: Sui Network Goes Down for Hours, Just Months After the Last Downtime
briefing: Blockchain network Sui is suffering another period of significant downtime barely five months after the last "network stall."

title: Apple iOS 27 Leaks: Siri Is Being Remade to Be More Like ChatGPT
summary: Apple iOS 27 Leaks: Siri Is Being Remade to Be More Like ChatGPT
briefing: Rendered illustrations published ahead of WWDC 2026 reveal a dedicated Siri app, Dynamic Island integration, and a Google Gemini backbone—the biggest overhaul to the assistant in nearly 15 years.

title: Kalshi Sues to Stop Minnesota From Enforcing America’s First Prediction Market Ban
summary: Kalshi Sues to Stop Minnesota From Enforcing America’s First Prediction Market Ban
briefing: Prediction market giant Kalshi has asked a federal judge to prevent Minnesota from allowing the ban to go into effect in August.

title: Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.8 Is Here: Better AI Coding, Smarter Safety—Same Huge Price
summary: Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.8 Is Here: Better AI Coding, Smarter Safety—Same Huge Price
briefing: Anthropic's latest flagship AI model Claude Opus 4.8 arrives with sharper reasoning, tighter alignment, and a price tag that hasn't budged.

title: Anthropic's Claude Mythos AI Model Nearing Release After Raising Cybersecurity Alarms
summary: Anthropic's Claude Mythos AI Model Nearing Release After Raising Cybersecurity Alarms
briefing: Anthropic signaled that broader access to its controversial Claude Mythos AI models may arrive "in the coming weeks" after limited testing.

title: Bitcoin Whales Are Pulling Back as Activity 'Mirrors' 2022 Bear Market: Analysts
summary: Bitcoin Whales Are Pulling Back as Activity 'Mirrors' 2022 Bear Market: Analysts
briefing: Current Bitcoin whale activity is similar in nature to the last bear market in 2022 when BTC fell precipitously, according to on-chain data.
